name: ai-agent-sdlc-enterprise-boilerplate
description: Governance-first AI-Agent SDLC boilerplate with intake, gates, policy templates, evaluations and audit artefacts.

scripts.check: npm run governance:check && npm run evals:check && npm run enterprise:check && npm run app:verify-zip && npm run app:verify-behavior && npm run security:scan && npm run release:gate
